title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Raghunathpur
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Raghunathpur assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Women voters of Raghunathpur demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Raghunathpur has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: High stakes battle in Raghunathpur as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Raghunathpur. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
